mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, C.BOARD_ID AS boardId, C.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, C.CONTENT AS content, C.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.NAME AS memberName FROM TRV_COMMENT C JOIN TRV_MEMBER M ON C.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE C.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_COMMENT (COMMENT_ID, BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, CONTENT) VALUES (TRV_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COMMENT_ID AS commentId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, CONTENT AS content, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TRV_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRV_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
